Schrager mock: Bailey #2 to Jets. "This will likely be either Bailey or Ohio State's Arvell Reese." UPDATED: Schrager AND Daniel Jeremiah both confirmed hearing Bailey is the #2 pick over Reese. Two of the most connected reporters in the league align on Bailey at #2.

Schrager mock #16 (via IND) to Jets: Omar Cooper Jr. WR. "Every GM I speak to seems to love Cooper. He's fearless and tough as nails — and he produces." Direct attribution to multiple GMs. Schrager compares Cooper to Deebo Samuel.

ESPN buzz: Allar "recently had a private workout" at Jets facility.

"Arvell Reese is the best fit for the Jets at No. 2." Cimini floats Reese over Bailey based on Aaron Glenn's trait profile (2026-04-18).
"The Jets are extremely high on Omar Cooper." Reid lists Cooper as a Round 2 priority if they go defense at 2 (2026-04-18).
"I would take [Reese] before any of the other guys. He's the most explosive." CBS one-week-out intel dump (2026-04-18).
"They have an opportunity to get the best wide receiver potentially with all their draft capital." DJ Conference Call Part I, 2026-04-16.
